steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• $1 + \left(\frac{55}{2}\right)^2$ $1 + \left(\frac{55}{2}\right)^2$ - wrong coefficient (missing the 2) and wrong denominator. Incorrect.
  • $1 + 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$ $1 + 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$ - matches the vertex value exactly. That is the correct answer.
  • $1 - 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$ $1 - 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$ - subtracts instead of adds, which would give a minimum, not a maximum. Incorrect.
  • $1 - 2\left(\frac{55}{2}\right)^2$ $1 - 2\left(\frac{55}{2}\right)^2$ - wrong sign and wrong denominator. Incorrect.
